title: Educational resources - Bank of Canada
content:
## Educational resources
Check out our educational resources and tools , an annotated list of financial literacy sites , and our Museum .

## Resources: The economy and our role

### The Economy, Plain and Simple
Learn more about the economic issues that matter to you.
Consult these brief articles explaining topics related to our core functions.

### Background materials
Find background information about the Bank and how we fulfill our mandate.
Convert from Canadian dollars based on daily exchange rates.
View daily, monthly and annual average exchange rate data.

### Inflation Calculator
Compare the cost of a basket of goods and services over time

### Investment Calculator
Calculate the effects of inflation on investments and savings

## Financial education resources
An annotated list of Canadian and international websites that provide financial information, on topics such as inflation, banking, personal finances, investing and consumer protection.

## Bank of Canada Museum
Expand your understanding of spending and saving, discover your place in the economy and explore a world-class currency collection.
Search our collection. Boasting more than 110,000 artifacts, our collection includes currency from around the world and from all historical periods.
Access our free school programs and lesson plans, and read our blog.
